extraction.one_line_summary: BILBAO Pello won Stage 3 after attacking on the final climb's descent, outsprinting YATES Simon on the line by one second.
tactical_patterns: BILBAO attacked on descent after summit rather than climb, catching YATES who expected relaxation after crest.
HONORE Miguel and FELINI Fabio went early breakaway day before birthday, suggesting morale/calendar-based attack timing.
VINE Jay prioritized KOM points over stage win, allowing BILBAO/YATES to contest finish while taking 15-second GC gap.
Astana crash affected multiple riders together, indicating poor peloton positioning by entire team unit.

rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: positive: won by attacking descent not climb, showing tactical maturity to exploit when rivals expected recovery
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: strong on climb for second but caught tactically by descending attack, lost stage by one second
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: leading race by 15 seconds after prioritizing KOM over stage, demonstrates clear GC focus over prestige
rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: negative: crashed and required bike change, positioned at back of peloton indicating poor day
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: neutral: fought back for fourth after being distanced, showed resilience but not enough for podium
